category_sources: source_facts.description says streams data between data stores and is a Kafka Connect replacement; official docs describe syncing data between production systems with an event-first experience.
display_name_sources: Official docs and GitHub README use Conduit as the project name; source_facts.name is conduit.
docs_sources: Official docs domain is docs.conduit.io; official GitHub README links conduit.io/docs/getting-started as documentation.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already set to https://github.com/ConduitIO/conduit, so repo enrichment was intentionally not changed.
tags_sources: source_facts.description mentions data stores and Kafka Connect replacement; official docs and README describe production data stores, connectors, real-time pipelines, and Go implementation.
